introSection: Mercury's Mini Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Twinlakes Park in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, UK.
fullText: Mercury's Mini Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Twinlakes Park in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, UK.
